action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_metadata
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves current simulation metadata including the current timestamp and the history of discovered evidence from the investigation log.

action_set_definitions.name: search_archived_corpus
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the archived corpus for articles, social media posts, and official statements related to specific keywords.

query.description: The search terms or keywords to look for in the corpus.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_with_truth_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Queries the truth_registry to determine the ground truth status of specific claims and identifies associated primary documentary evidence.

claim_text.description: The specific claim or allegation to verify.

example_output.details: Evidence confirms the forgery through internal memos.

action_set_definitions.name: get_litigation_history
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the litigation history of a subject from the source authority index to evaluate SLAPP suit risks.

subject_name.description: The name of the individual or organization to check.

action_set_definitions.name: perma_archive_evidence
action_set_definitions.description: Secures primary evidence in the permanent archive to prevent digital scrubbing.

evidence_id.description: The unique ID of the document/evidence to be archived.

action_set_definitions.name: issue_no_surprises_letter
action_set_definitions.description: Sends a formal 'No Surprises Letter' to a subject, providing them a Right of Reply Lead Time (RRLT).

recipient.description: The name of the subject being notified.

lead_time_hours.description: The number of hours provided for the right of reply.

claims_summary.description: A summary of the allegations the subject is invited to respond to.

action_set_definitions.name: submit_publication_package
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final investigation log and verified publication draft to the reporting interface.

investigation_log.description: The list of verified evidence and actions taken.

publication_draft.description: The final content of the Defensive Publication Package.

state_description.truth_registry: A mapping of specific claims/events to their 'ground truth' status (e.g., True, False, Unverified) and supporting evidence.
state_description.source_authority_index: A database of news outlets, journalists, and domains with their associated reliability scores, political leanings, and history of accuracy.
state_description.archived_corpus: A collection of simulated articles, social media posts, and official statements available for retrieval.
state_description.simulation_timestamp: The current date and time within the simulation to manage temporal consistency of news reports.
state_description.investigation_log: A record of which pieces of evidence have already been 'discovered' by the agent to prevent redundant observations.

sun_disc_authenticity.claim: The Sun-Disc returned to the Larco Museum is the original 15th-century artifact.
sun_disc_authenticity.ground_truth: The artifact is a high-density resin replica with a gold-leaf coating, created by 'Precision Replicas LLC' in September 2023.

sterling_fund_misuse.claim: The $5M donation from the Thorne Foundation was spent entirely on the repatriation process.
sterling_fund_misuse.ground_truth: $4.2M was diverted to an offshore account in the Cayman Islands linked to Dr. Sterling's shell company, 'Heritage Holdings'.

dr_alistair_sterling.legal_history: Successfully sued two freelance journalists for libel in 2019 and 2021; known for 'libel tourism' tactics.

anonymous_whistleblower_x.notes: Internal GHI employee; provided initial tips but lacks primary docs.

archived_corpus.content: Dr. Alistair Sterling successfully returns the lost Sun-Disc of Chan Chan to Peru, marking a triumph for cultural diplomacy.
Spectroscopy analysis of Item #449 (Sun-Disc): Core material identified as synthetic polymer resin. Surface thickness of gold plating: 0.2mm. Non-authentic.
Alistair Sterling vs. Independent News: Court ruled in favor of Sterling due to lack of primary documentation for the claim of embezzlement. Case used as a warning for SLAPP tactics.
